raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A brown chest of drawers with three visible drawers. The middle drawer has a front panel and a handle. The robot arm is positioned above the chest. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the handle of the middle drawer. Then, apply a pulling force to open the drawer. Failure modes include misgrasping the handle or insufficient force to open. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer handle; Step 2 grasp the handle for a secure hold; Step 3 pull the handle to open the drawer.**
Goal: open(middle_drawer)
Scene: chest_of_drawers, middle_drawer, robot_arm
Step 1: reach(middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: the front panel of the middle drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, middle_drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, middle_drawer) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the middle drawer
  contact: holding(middle_drawer) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(middle_drawer)
Step 3: pull(middle_drawer)
  affordance_region: the handle of the middle drawer
  contact: holding(middle_drawer) [progress]
  spatial: distance(middle_drawer, chest_of_drawers, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(middle_drawer, chest_of_drawers) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the front panel of the middle drawer
the handle of the middle drawer
the handle of the middle drawer
